Aurelian — Campaign
Visual System

Brand

Aurelian

Category

Fashion · Custom Tailoring

Deliverables

AI Visuals · Brand System · Lookbook

Year

2026

The Challenge

From phone shots
to studio standard.

Aurelian came to us with raw, unedited photoshoot images taken on a smartphone — good intention, limited execution. The lighting was inconsistent, backgrounds were informal, and the overall feel didn't match the brand's quiet luxury positioning.

"We had the outfits, we had the model — we just didn't have the studio."

The brief was clear: transform these casual reference shots into campaign-ready visuals that could sit alongside international menswear brands — without a single re-shoot.

AI Output · Final Visual

The Transformation

Before & After

Raw Client Images

Phone camera shots taken in a home environment. Natural but inconsistent — mixed lighting, informal backgrounds, no visual system. These were the starting reference material.

AI-Generated Studio Visuals

Each reference was studied for pose, clothing detail, and character — then rebuilt using AI generation tools to match a defined studio lighting system, consistent backdrop, and brand-aligned aesthetic.

Before
Before
After · AI Visual
After · AI Visual

Left: raw reference images provided by client  ·  Right: AI-generated studio visuals

How We Did It

The Process

01

Reference Analysis

We studied each phone image carefully — extracting clothing details, pose language, model features, and the intended vibe the client was going for, even when the execution fell short.

02

Moodboard & Direction

A visual system was defined: warm greige backdrop, soft directional studio light from the left, warm shadows — evoking the tone of high-end menswear editorials without being cold or clinical.

03

AI Generation & Refinement

Using structured prompt systems, we rebuilt each look — preserving outfit accuracy and pose intention, while elevating everything around it. Multiple iterations per shot until studio quality was achieved.

Brand Visual System

Consistency by design.

Beyond individual images, we developed a repeatable visual language for Aurelian — so every future shoot, real or AI-generated, would feel like it belongs to the same world.

Colour Palette

Warm neutrals — no pure blacks or whites

Typography Direction

Aurelian

Serif · Light weight · Wide spacing

Brand Tone

Quiet Deliberate Confident Refined Unhurried South Asian

Lighting System

Soft key light — left side, 45°
Warm fill — right, reduced intensity
Greige seamless backdrop — no cast shadows
No harsh specular highlights on fabric

Final Deliverables

The Lookbook

A full set of campaign-ready AI visuals — consistent model, consistent lighting, consistent brand feel. Ready to publish across social media, lookbooks, and the brand website.

The Outcome

Results that speak.

3×

Visual quality improvement over original phone images — measured by client feedback and comparison review.

0

Re-shoots required. All final visuals generated from the original reference images using AI.

12+

Campaign-ready images delivered with full brand visual system consistency across the entire lookbook.
